title: Cover for pizza dough machine, dustproof and waterproof Oxford fabric protection, protective cover for commercial dough kneading machines - for student dormitories, apartments, kitchens, shops
features: OPTIMIZED PORTABILITY AND SPACE SAVING The pizza twist lid increases kitchen efficiency through space-saving design and integrated side storage for tools and papers. This storage keeps everything handy and allows for quick grab and go functionality, ideal for busy chefs who want to effortlessly maintain an organized and clean cooking environment. The lid promotes efficient workflow and optimises use in any kitchen.

Universal fit functionality: the pizza spinner cover is matched to popular pizza spinner designs and ensures a firm fit that minimises interference, increases ease of use and supports consistent results in pizza making in professional or private kitchens. It offers versatile compatibility that allows easy integration into existing work processes and provides reliability in everyday or upscale culinary

REDUCED MECHANICAL WEAR The pizza spinner cover blocks oil and dust, minimizing dirt ingress, protecting internal components and reducing mechanical wear. This extends maintenance cycles that increase operational efficiency, especially in heavily used commercial areas where cleanliness is important and coverage by permanent contamination protection supports performance stability.

DESIGNED FOR DURABILITY: This pizza dough spinner cover is designed with reinforced seams and elastic edge seal to deliver high endurance under frequent use. It provides comprehensive protection that effectively protects your tools and maintains their performance in demanding environments, promoting durability and functionality in commercial kitchens.

WATERPROOF SURFACE SOLUTION Made of 420D Oxford fabric, the pizza dough cover has water and prevents penetration, allows for effortless wiping after use and is great for maintaining hygiene in any kitchen environment, the waterproof property ensures easy maintenance and reliable protection from moisture, ideal for home and commercial kitchens where cleanliness and quick cleaning while standing.
description: The accessories protective cover for the commercial pizza turner provides good protection for your pizza turner in different environments. Made of durable Oxford fabric, this case ensures waterproof and dustproof performance and protects your devices from environmental damage. Their protective design makes them ideal for use at home, in a dorm or apartment as well as in commercial spaces such as shops and restaurants. The sleeve construction ensures a secure fit, holds the cover firmly in place and provides an extra layer of protection against daily wear and tear. Specification: Product Name: Pizza Spinner Cover Material: 420D Oxford cloth. Colour: black. Item weight: 300g, 350g Product size: 22.38 × 28.38 × 30 inches, 22.38 × 28.38 × 30 inches. Packing list: 1 x pizza spinner cover. Note: Due to different lighting and screen settings, the item colours may vary slightly from the pictures. Due to the differences in manual measurement, please allow a size of 1-2 cm in size.
